title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1112 - Director to provide buyer's guide — content — advertising of long-term care policies to contain notice of availability of guide
text:
376.1112.  Director to provide buyer's guide — content — advertising of long-term care policies to contain notice of availability of guide. — The director shall prepare a guide that explains the factors to be considered in selecting long-term care insurance and the consequences of particular clauses and exclusions.  The guide shall be made available to the public and to interested organizations upon request.  Any advertisement in this state relating to long-term care insurance shall include notice of availability of this guide from the director.
(L. 1990 S.B. 765 § 6 subsec. 1) 
Transferred 2002; formerly 376.956
